title: Container Creation, Process Lifecycle, CLI State, and Cleanup
description: A support utility must run repeatedly with explicit inputs, observable exit behavior, bounded names, and cleanup that never deletes unrelated state. Learners cumulatively produce deterministic container lifecycle runbook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish create, run, start, attach, exec, stop, kill, restart, pause, wait, remove, and auto-remove state transitions.
Apply names, environment, working directory, user, entrypoint, command, labels, hosts, and platform overrides with correct precedence.
Choose foreground, detached, interactive, TTY, attach, and log behavior while preserving standard streams and exit evidence.
